case_title: AMY P.H. LUK VS. FAI CHOY INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUK, AMY P.H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC. $1,882.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,932.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-13-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF AMY LUK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN CHE, MANAGER. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT REQUIRING TEN MONTHS TO COMPLETE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE DECEMBER HEARING, CONTINUE ONCE MORE TO JUNE OF 2019. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE JUNE OF 2019 HEARING, MATTER WILL THEN BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,382.00 FILED BY LUK, AMY P.H. AS TO DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED MAY-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-02-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AMY P.H. LUK. DEFENDANT FAI CHOY INC. DID NOT APPEAR. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE DOWN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
